# REBAR SHOP OS

> AI-powered rebar fabrication and shop-management platform for reinforcing-steel contractors in Ontario, Canada. Covers estimating, shop-floor tracking, deliveries, CRM, and accounting.

REBAR SHOP OS is the operating system used by Rebar.shop to run rebar fabrication: AI estimating against CSA G30.18 / RSIC, live shop-floor production, delivery routing, sales pipeline, and QuickBooks-integrated accounting.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview of REBAR SHOP OS.
- [Knowledge Base](/knowledge-base): Public help articles and FAQs about rebar fabrication and the platform.
- [Customer Portal](/portal): Customer self-serve portal entry point.
- [Vendor Portal](/vendor-portal): Vendor self-serve portal entry point.
- [Install](/install): Install REBAR SHOP OS as a PWA on your device.
- [Sign in](/login): Sign in for existing users.
- [Sign up](/signup): Request access.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms of use.
- [Data Deletion](/data-deletion): How to request data deletion.
